name: feature.csm.nodes
description: CSM feature node pack (ADR 0014) — read/health nodes over the ctx.features.csm surface shipped by the CSM feature package. health-read lists at-risk accounts; health-set updates an existing account's score (idempotent, replay-safe).
author: OpenWOP App

nodes.label: CSM Health Read
nodes.description: Reads customer-success accounts (lowest health first) or one by id, over ctx.features.csm. Tenant-guarded.

nodes.label: CSM Health Set
nodes.description: Sets healthScore/name on an EXISTING account by id, over ctx.features.csm. Tenant-guarded + idempotent (update-only — replay/fork safe).
